intent: Write a short comic-and-canon piece on 'why /f/funny posts age well or badly', grounded in humor-theory definitions. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) Reddit — browse /f/funny for 3 top posts that rely on a specific joke mechanic (pun, visual gag, irony). Collect title, score, comment count, and describe the mechanic. (2) Wikipedia — open the article on 'Theories of humor' or 'Humour' and extract 3-4 facts about mechanisms like incongruity, superiority, or relief. The report must: (a) name the mechanic per post, (b) map each to a Wikipedia humor theory, (c) predict which posts will feel dated in 5 years and why, (d) close with a theory-grounded takeaway. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Easy tier. Reddit (funny) + Wikipedia (humor theory). Mechanic-tagging exercise.
